_comment: Top-level structure: { meta: {...}, companies: { SYMBOL: { symbol, currency, years: { YEAR: {...} }, cagr_2018_2025 } } }. DO NOT remove meta or companies keys — validate_data.py depends on them.

meta.note: 所有货币数值单位为人民币万元或%；data_type: actual=已披露, forecast=预测
